title: Gaimon Guards the Island of Rare Animals
description: On pages 26–28, Luffy, Zoro, and Nami reach a strange island where Gaimon and the rare animals guard a lonely mystery.
scene: The crew’s lighthearted exploration turns into a small fable about treasure, isolation, and the life Gaimon built after being trapped on the island.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: WAHA- Haha- Haha- haha- haha- haha- haha- haha- haha- haha- haha- haha- haha- haha- haha- haha- haha- haha- haha- haha- haha- haha- haha- haha- haha- haha- haha- haha- haha- haha-

dialogue.speaker: Gaimon
dialogue.text: Don't be so dissa- pointed, uncle! You meeting us after these 20 years is a really good thing too!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: 'Cause if it had been 30 years, you might've already be dead!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Strawhat Kid...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Luffy...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Don't worry, there is still the great treasure "one piece" waiting for us!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Will you join us, Uncle?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You're inviting me?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Uncle...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Are you sure, you're really going to stay on this island?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Yes!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Thank you for inviting me...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But I still want to be the "forest Guardian"

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Why?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Because there are many rare animals in this forest....

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You're right! We saw a strange snake and pig!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: There were many people who came to this island to get those animals,

dialogue.speaker: Gaimon
dialogue.text: And living here for 20 years made me grown to love those animals

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I can't leave them behind!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You're a rare and precious animal too, uncle!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'm gonna kill you!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Now that there are no more treasures, I feel somewhat relieved,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I can now live in this island more comfortably

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's too bad, you are an interesting person, Uncle!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'm sure you'll find good company-ions for your crew!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And also find the "one piece",

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Then buy the whole world!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That's right! I can do it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: See ya!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: After leaving Gaimon- San,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The boats sail towards the "Grand Line" once again

summary: This part works as a pause between major arcs, showing that the sea contains strange lives and unusual dreams beyond simple battles.
